results.rendered_html: 2. bhīṣā instr. adv. aus Furcht  ṚV. 1,133,6 . dyāvā rejete pṛthivī ca bhīṣā 8,86,14 . 7,21,3 .  TBR. 3,7,8,1 . yasmādbhīṣā niṣīdasi  AIT. BR. 5,27 . rakṣobhyo bhīṣā  ŚAT. BR. 3,6,3,8 . sa bhīṣā nililye 1,2,3,1 . 3,7,3,2 . 8,3,28 .  KĀṬH. 23,3 . bhīṣāsmādvātaḥ pavate . bhīṣodeti sūryaḥ . bhīṣāsmādagniścendraśca . mṛtyurdhāvati pañcamaḥ  TAITT. UP. 2,8 ; vgl.  KAṬHOP. 6,3 , wo bhayādasya st. bhīṣāsmāt steht. — Vielleicht aus bhiyasā zusammengezogen; oder instr. von bhīs = 2. bhī.
